comment.body:
-  Clear open below centroid: Took longer-term put (ok conviction)
-  First 5m candle closing 5pt below downside pivot: Went more short delta (more conviction)
-  Exit for 6.645 got triggered
Did not expect price to rush so fast through 6.645, since gex being so big positive. Guess, my fault was to ignore how fast realized vola was rising?
